hierarchy_rules: H1 (Dashboard Titles): text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900
H2 (Section/Card Headers): text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
H3 (Subsections): text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: The 'Control Room' grid protocol. High density, data correlation, sharp functional spacing.
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) for data grids.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Sharp edges, max 4px border-radius (rounded-sm) for all cards and interactive elements.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense data, metrics, and labels. Center align only empty states or distinct CTAs.

shadcn_overrides.Card: Remove default shadow. Use flat background, 1px solid border-slate-200. rounded-sm.
shadcn_overrides.Button: Square or rounded-sm corners. High contrast. Primary uses Brand #0033CC.
shadcn_overrides.Badge: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), flat colors. Use for Priority and Systems.
shadcn_overrides.Table: Dense. padding-y 2 or 3. 1px bottom border. Hover state on rows: bg-slate-50.
shadcn_overrides.Tabs: Underline style preferred over pill style to save space and look technical.

custom_patterns.kanban_board: Columns should have a light gray background (#F8F9FA). Cards are white, flat, 1px border. Drag indicator is a subtle grip icon (Phosphor).
custom_patterns.team_workload_bar: Stacked or inline progress bar inside a table cell. Use status colors.
custom_patterns.kpi_cards: Top line metric should be massive (text-3xl) using Chivo, label in text-xs uppercase mono.
custom_patterns.filter_chips: Small interactive badges representing active filters, rounded-sm, removable via 'x' icon.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp color shifts. Tables rows shift to #F1F3F5. Buttons slightly darken.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast. 150ms ease-in-out. Do not over-animate data panels.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-brand-primary. Essential for accessibility.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Regular or Duotone weight. Clean, technical.

login_background.description: Grid pattern window in a dark room - Use as a subtle, structural background for the login page to establish the 'architectural/structured' theme of the PM app.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass APCA and WCAG AA standards. Ensure P2 (Amber) text on white uses a darker shade if necessary, or use as background with black text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='sprint-board-p1-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons for all UI icons. It fits the 'Swiss' technical vibe perfectly.
Stick rigidly to the Light theme with the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Do not add soft shadows or glassmorphism to data cards.
Install and use Recharts for Sprint velocity and productivity charts.
For the Kanban sprint board, use @hello-pangea/dnd (or similar modern DnD library) and ensure columns are vertically scrollable while the page header stays fixed.
The UI must feel like a strict, professional IT 'Control Room'. Function over decoration.
Ensure the priority badges (P1, P2, etc.) use the defined status colors strictly.
Build the front end using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
ALL files should be .js or .jsx (not .tsx) as requested.
Ensure all components (especially custom ones) use the `data-testid` attribute extensively.
